title: philotheca scabra subsp. scabra
intro: Philotheca scabra subsp. scabra, also known as the Rough-leaf Philotheca, is a shrubby plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Philotheca scabra subsp. scabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves and branches of the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
